name: toggle-with-text
visual_summary: The toggle-with-text component is a toggle button with a text label that can be used to display a checkbox-like functionality in conjunction with text. Developers would use this component to represent a yes/no or on/off state. Suitable for applications requiring a clear and concise way to present binary choices.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-with-text
Description: The toggle-with-text component is a toggle button with a text label that can be used to display a checkbox-like functionality in conjunction with text. Developers would use this component to represent a yes/no or on/off state. Suitable for applications requiring a clear and concise way to present binary choices.
Style: flat, rounded
Interactions: clickable, toggled
Tags: input, checkbox, toggle, state

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
